zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Dreux於1217年7月28日出生在法國艾-吉洛易德時，他的父親Robert III dit Gasteblé comte de Dreux32歲，母親Aliénor de Saint-Valéry25歲。他於大約1253年與Clémence de Châteaudun, Viscountess de Châteaudun結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1281年11月14日在法國布列塔尼波奧瑟享年64歲，埋葬在法國瓦爾利艾格利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert de Dreux于1217年7月28日出生在法国艾-吉洛易德时，他的父亲Robert III dit Gasteblé comte de Dreux32岁，母亲Aliénor de Saint-Valéry25岁。他于大约1253年与Clémence de Châteaudun, Viscountess de Châteaudun结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。他去世于1281年11月14日在法国布列塔尼波奧瑟享年64岁，埋葬在法国瓦爾利艾格利。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Dreux
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Druce
meanings: English: variant of   Drewes  , a surname of French origin.
Possibly an altered form of Dutch and German   Drewes  .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Dreux was born on 28 July 1217, in Dreux, Eure-et-Loir, France, his father, Robert III dit Gasteblé comte de Dreux, was 32 and his mother, Aliénor de Saint-Valéry, was 25. He married Clémence de Châteaudun, Viscountess de Châteaudun about 1253. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died on 14 November 1281, in Beaucé, Brittany, France, at the age of 64, and was buried in L'Église, Var, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Dreux est né le 28 juillet 1217, à Dreux, Eure-et-Loir, France, son père, Robert III dit Gasteblé comte de Dreux, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Aliénor de Saint-Valéry, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Clémence de Châteaudun, Viscountess de Châteaudun environ 1253. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé le 14 novembre 1281, à Beaucé, Bretagne, France, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterré à L'Église, Var, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert de Dreux am 28. Juli 1217 in Dreux, Eure-et-Loir, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert III dit Gasteblé comte de Dreux 32 und seine Mutter Aliénor de Saint-Valéry 25. Er hat um 1253 Clémence de Châteaudun, Viscountess de Châteaudun geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb am 14. November 1281 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Beaucé, Bretagne, Frankreich und wurde in L'Église, Var, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Dreux è nato il il 28 luglio 1217 nel Dreux, Eure-et-Loir, Francia, il suo padre, Robert III dit Gasteblé comte de Dreux, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Aliénor de Saint-Valéry, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Clémence de Châteaudun, Viscountess de Châteaudun circa 1253. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì il 14 novembre 1281, nel Beaucé, Bretagne, Francia, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolto a L'Église, Var, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Dreuxが1217年7月28日にフランスエウレ-エト-ロイルドレウックスで生まれた時，父Robert III dit Gasteblé comte de Dreuxは32歳，母Aliénor de Saint-Valéryは25歳であった。約1253年にClémence de Châteaudun, Viscountess de Châteaudunと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼は1281年11月14日にフランスブレタグンビーウクeで64歳で死去し，フランスバール'eグリゼにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Dreux(이)가 1217년 7월 28일 프랑스 우레-트-로이르 드레우스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert III dit Gasteblé comte de Dreux(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Aliénor de Saint-Valéry(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1253년 Clémence de Châteaudun, Viscountess de Châteaudun(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1281년 11월 14일 프랑스 브레타그니 보ce에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 바르 'e그리스에 묻혔다.

mn.28 July 1217–14 November 1281: 1217 оны Долоодугаар сарын 28–1281 оны Арваннэгдүгээр сарын 14

pt.28 July 1217–14 November 1281: 28 de julho de 1217–14 de novembro de 1281
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Dreux nasceu em 28 de julho de 1217, em Dreux, Eure-et-Loir, França, seu pai, Robert III dit Gasteblé comte de Dreux, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Aliénor de Saint-Valéry, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Clémence de Châteaudun, Viscountess de Châteaudun aproximadamente 1253. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 14 de novembro de 1281, em Beaucé, Bretagne, França, com 64 anos, e foi sepultado em L'Église, Var, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Dreux родился 28 июля 1217 г. в местности дреукс, эуре-ет-лоир, Франция, его отцу по имени Robert III dit Gasteblé comte de Dreux было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Aliénor de Saint-Valéry, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Clémence de Châteaudun, Viscountess de Châteaudun около 1253 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер 14 ноября 1281 г. в местности бокe, бретагн, Франция в возрасте 64 лет и был похоронен в местности л'eглис, вар, Франция.

es.28 July 1217–14 November 1281: 28 de julio de 1217–14 de noviembre de 1281
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert de Dreux nació el 28 de julio de 1217, en Dreux, Eure-et-Loir, Francia, su papá, Robert III dit Gasteblé comte de Dreux, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Aliénor de Saint-Valéry, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Clémence de Châteaudun, Viscountess de Châteaudun aproximadamente 1253. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió el 14 de noviembre de 1281, en Beaucé, Bretagne, Francia, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultado en L'Église, Var, Francia.
